title: [codereview-pass1] Kconfig for LICHEN_TDMA lacks dependency on LICHEN_RPL and detailed acceptance criteria
description: Per AGENTS.md init graph, TDMA depends on link and RPL. Add select LICHEN_RPL. Add --acceptance for 3 clean passes. Tag codereview. Parent project-LICHEN-majo
acceptance_criteria: 1. LICHEN_TDMA Kconfig now depends on LICHEN_RPL per AGENTS.md init dependency graph. 2. LICHEN_LINK_CCP16_LOAD_BALANCING continues to select it. 3. Three consecutive /codereview passes produce zero P0-P1 findings. 4. All review findings filed as codereview-tagged beads. 5. bd ready --limit 5 run at end. Do not close bead until 3 clean passes.
close_reason: Fixed in integration pass; 3 clean codereview passes with only opinion/P4 findings
